alerts.headline: Special Weather Statement issued March 6 at 12:28PM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
Spotty freezing drizzle is possible through tonight north of the
Mass Pike and in the higher elevations. Be alert for icy spots on
untreated roads.

Across the rest of southern New England, including areas near the
coast, temperatures will fall to around freezing later tonight
into early Saturday morning. Leftover moisture may produce icy
spots on untreated roads in these areas as well.

Plan on allowing extra travel time and be especially careful on
bridges and overpasses.

Temperatures will warm above freezing Saturday morning.

nws_forecast.name: This Afternoon
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog and a slight chance of sleet and a slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a high near 35. Northeast wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog before 7pm, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain between 7pm and 1am, then a chance of drizzle and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a low around 34. East wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of drizzle and patchy fog before noon. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 47. South wind 5 to 12 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog before 7pm, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain between 7pm and midnight, then a chance of rain and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and patchy fog before 8am, then areas of fog and a slight chance of rain between 8am and 10am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 53. Southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 38. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 56. Southwest wind 7 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Clear, with a low around 43. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 59. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 40. South wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely. Cloudy, with a high near 49. Southeast wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely. Cloudy, with a low around 34. Northeast wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 43. Northwest wind around 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Snow then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 8pm, then a slight chance of snow between 8pm and midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 26. Northwest wind around 12 mph.
